name: Braised Lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each head of lettuce into four pieces, leaving a portion of the center stem on each section to hold the leaves together.
2. Heat the bacon fat in a large skillet.
3. Add the lettuce to the skillet and cover.
4. Cook for 30 minutes, or until the lettuce is tender. If much liquid is drawn out, discard some during cooking.
5. Turn carefully if necessary.
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Serve on a hot platter.
